reviews.review_description: This game has survived 2 shut downs and copyrights this game is invincible and earns respect I did the new ritual the first person to actually do it with other people and it was insane I love the effort they put into this game imma make millions of videos on this game shoutout snowy for doing his best love the game

reviews.review_title: My honest review about Fearing Gorilla
reviews.review_description: I've been playing fearing gorllia for about a year and a half. This game is amazing, fun, and scary. But there are some bad things that come too. Im too scared to spend money on the game because it might be taken down AGAIN. So I dont want to spend money on a game that will be probably took down again. But this game is pretty cool and scary. A big problem i have is that the severs suck I can't even play the game. I know they want us to buy crystals to help them. But I dont want to spend money on a game that will be taken down over and over. If you want to make money, add bundles and more. After a while of the game being up, I might buy stuff. If the cosmetics are cool. A koala hat would be good. Also, add more mechanics. This game needs more mechanics. Like a map you can look at that tells you where everyone is. Add summonings that are cool and unique. Mabey, add a boss fight you can do for a free cosmetic. This game has potential. I mean a lot. I can tell this game will become popular. They just need to tweak their game a bit and make sure it doesn't get taken down again. But overall, I'll say this game is pretty good and has a lot of potential. Good job, devs.

reviews.review_description: I have been playing this game for about a year. And it still lives up to the hype. It is very fun and scary. But there is one setback right now. It has  a 100 ccu limit. So not too many people can play the game right now. But it is still very fun. This is my favorite gorilla tag inspired movement horror game.

reviews.review_title: I honestly think you should play it.
reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely fun And worth it to play with friends. They have dream core back room levels and many more other maps. It would be fun going around summoning monsters and having a fun time with friends it survived two shutdowns and honestly, this game is absolutely fun and scary if you wanna get scared I would recommend to anybody wanting to play with at least four friends or two if you want to beat the back rooms levels or you can beat them by yourself. This game has many options on what maps do you wanna play or what you wanna summon I hope you love the game just like I do. It would be exciting and fun to play over the summer.
Why I can not join??????????

reviews.review_title: Fearing Gorilla is the best game ever
reviews.review_description: Fearing Gorilla is a game full of monkeys where u play with friends summon different tipes of monster & gods. in my opinion the game deserves lot of more players so that you could get more friends ￼and lern a lot more that the game has to offer, also u could get ingame cosmetics which makes you look stand out, to get ingame cosmetics, and theirs 2 ways to get crystals, first is wait 1 day to get 100 crystals, or the better way is to buy crystals, you could make a difference in the game by doing this you could make the game have more ingame servers and make a better place for you and the others. dont be shy to to make make friends because this is THE most friendly community you will ever be a part of. GOOD LUCK ENJOY THE GAME!!!!!￼

Amazing game thats why its still a solid 3 star rating. Only issue as of right now is when I open the game it tells me my connection does not work. I have reloaded and uninstalled the game with no luck. I am not sure if it is only on my end but right now I am unable to play Fearing Gorilla. Please resolve this issue as soon as possible because this is one of my favorite games to play. (Also please unban me from the discord I do apologize for what I did.)

fearing gorilla is back but the only problem is that the servers are very bad because of low budget and and what i do to fix the servers is i just leave and rejoin but basically if that's not working or you can't load in then you need to uninstall and reinstall the game (note for Dev, this game is becoming unpopular/unknown to many people, there is almost always only one server that is full at any given time and sometimes no one is online)
Graphics are so good and the game honestly scared the heck out of me 😭 you should give this game a try.

Fearing Gorilla gives you a mix of goofy and scary (more scary). The fact that gorilla tag shut it down not once but TWICE is crazy. They really use the BIGGEST magnifying glass just to make the devs lives hell. This 5 star review is well deserved. Thank you for still existing Fearing Gorilla.
